title: Character Personality Fusions
wikitext:
[]: Character Personality Fusions             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Sep 29, 2009 1:27 pm If you could fuse a character's personality with another in the first one's body, which one would you merge? It would be funny to merge Kensuke's personality with Misato's in Kensuke's body. A very nerdy kid who loves electronics, war, and robots who is also a heavy drinker that everyone sleeps with. That would be a hilarious paradox. Anyone else?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 29, 2009 1:31 pm Gendo, Ritsuko, Misato, and Shinji. And in Shinji's body.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:18 pm Toji with Maya's fondness for cute things would be rather memorable. Imagine his tough guy "Don't you have any balls?!" act while he's prancing about in a pink track suit and carrying a schoolbag covered in rainbow/unicorn stickers. Oh, and he should implicitly still be straight just in case you were wondering.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:30 pm NemZ wrote: Toji with Maya's fondness for cute things would be rather memorable. Imagine his tough guy "Don't you have any balls?!" act while he's prancing about in a pink track suit and carrying a schoolbag covered in rainbow/unicorn stickers. Oh, and he should implicitly still be straight just in case you were wondering.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Sep 29, 2009 3:33 pm NemZ wrote: Toji with Maya's fondness for cute things would be rather memorable. Imagine his tough guy "Don't you have any balls?!" act while he's prancing about in a pink track suit and carrying a schoolbag covered in rainbow/unicorn stickers. Oh, and he should implicitly still be straight just in case you were wondering.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 3:52 pm Hmm... Gendo/Hikari? Pigtails, freckles, and a soul-crushing gaze behind creepy shades. She sits at the teacher's desk with steepled hands, striking terror into the hearts of her classmates while the old teacher guy rambles on incoherently about impacts and scenarios behind her, always standing at attention.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Sep 29, 2009 3:54 pm lol, I just got hilariously wrong idea: ShinjiKaji Imagine the suave ladies man badass agent with Shinji's whining and confidence issues: "I suck!" "Don't run away don't run away don't run away" etc.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 4:09 pm Black Hyouga/Rei. I just want to see how horrible the dub can get. "Damn, Ain't you got no faith in yo papa's work, little G?"

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 29, 2009 4:12 pm ...I would just picture Rei talking the same dialogue but with a ghetto chick or southern accent...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 4:15 pm ^ Yeah, but what fun would that be? Might as well just let her go completely gangsta.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 29, 2009 4:18 pm Like this? lol

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Sep 29, 2009 4:22 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Like this? lol

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Sep 29, 2009 5:55 pm Rei takeing out Sahaquiel Now I'm real happy for ya, and imma let you finish, but Lillith had one of the best reentries of all time.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Tue Sep 29, 2009 6:18 pm Teague wrote: Rei takeing out Sahaquiel Now I'm real happy for ya, and imma let you finish, but Lillith had one of the best reentries of all time.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Tue Sep 29, 2009 7:05 pm NemZ wrote: Toji with Maya's fondness for cute things would be rather memorable. ...and carrying a schoolbag covered in rainbow/unicorn stickers. Oh, and he should implicitly still be straight just in case you were wondering.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Sep 29, 2009 7:48 pm Mongoosedog wrote: Kaji's personality in Gendo's body, just imagine Gendo hitting on every girl that walks by

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 29, 2009 7:55 pm Sachiel with Shinji's personality. Hilarity insues. Better yet Pre-third impact Shinji's personality.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 8:00 pm all the angels with the personalities Reichu has imagined up for them.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Tue Sep 29, 2009 8:15 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Sachiel with Shinji's personality. Hilarity insues... Better yet Pre-third impact Shinji's personality.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Sep 29, 2009 8:17 pm Pen-Pen with Arael's personality. That would be a living nightmare. Him sneaking into Shinji's room then.....does stuff.....all while torturing him with painful memories. Shinji tells Misato what happened in the night and Misato says its a dream. Shinji looks over at Pen-Pen who is just sitting in a chair reading a paper. Pen-Pen then stares at Shinji for 5 minutes while he's eating his breakfast.
